name: Closed Hip Twist (Advanced)
preceding_figure_names: Alemena, Hand To Hand RSP, Natural Top, New York LSP, Rope Spinning, Shoulder To Shoulder Left Side
following_figure_names: Alemena, Hockey Stick, Open Basic Movement, Time Step LF, Open Hip Twist, Curl, Cuban Break LF, Split Cuban Break LF, Chase, Turkish Towel, Sweetheart, Follow My Leader, New York LSP, Spot or Switch Turn To R, Underarm Turn to L, Three Cha Cha Chas Forward, Reverse Top
notes:
Other finishing positions:
Open Position
Man turns 1/4 to L over 7-10
Open CPP
Man turn 1/8 L over 7 & 8, leading lady to overturn on 7, both taking 8 diagonally fwd to chasse in Open CPP
Lady turns an additional 1/8 L on 7 using a loosely crossed spiral action
Contact Position
Man 1/2 L over 7-10, dancing the ahsse side and slightly fwd.
Lady 3/4 L over 7-10 dancing the chasse with LF behind RF as Cuban Cross.
Normal hold retained throughout.

steps.action: Step to side or forward in RSP with slight body turn to R
Step back in RSP with 1/2 turn to R
comments: small locks toward Man, build the tension, till the end, sharp half turn to R (turn body first, then snap hips and head).

steps.action: Compact chasse LRL with very slight body turn to L
RF to side to chasse RLR, ending in Fan Position
RF forward in line with LF towards Man's right side, chasse RLR, 1/2 turn to L
comments: This is pressed walk with RF fwd, a big diagonal to L. (it's a fwd step, really throw L hip back. hip should not be flat), knee flexed. heel is not lowered.
"&": LF closed to RF, both knees bent.
"1": RF to side, slightly back, still facing Man at this moment.
Keep head stable, not moving left and right.

steps.action: Step forward passing in front of Man
comments: Turn starts at e/o previous beat, Turn is initiated from hips, which are turned more than upper body, Small step

steps.action: RF forward in line with LF, then turn to end RF back, 1/2 to L, body turns less
Back Lock LRL, end in Fan Position, body completes turn
comments: Man holding lady on palm, not around fingers. arms low, at Lady's waist level.
"1&" - on "&", settle L hip, which draws in RF, preparing for next step, i.e. Hockey Stick.
